channel.title: Strict Programming Language Blog
channel.description: The best place to stay up-to-date with the latest Strict Programming Language news and events.

item.title: Strict is still work in progress
item.description: We didn't have much time to work on the website, the language changed quite a lot into a more functional style, while still being fully declarative and test driven. The IntelliJ IDE is still being worked on and once that is finished the language will...

item.title: Strict.dev website is up
item.description: After trying out https://jekyllrb.com/ and many themes and plugins after checking out the even more complex https://gohugo.io/ it turns out these are not good fits for the Strict language, which should be easy to install and work immediately. https:/...
